title: Module 5 Learning Resource Pathway
description: A flowchart illustrating the suggested sequence and relationships between different types of learning resources for mastering the topics in Module 5.
relationships: Start with Core Textbook Reading for foundational concepts, proceed to Video Lecture for visual explanation, then apply knowledge with an Interactive Tutorial and Practice Dataset, deepen understanding with a Research Paper, clarify doubts on the Discussion Forum, and finally assess comprehension with the Final Knowledge Check.
